title: add claude support
business_req: Integrate Claude to enhance automation and efficiency of LinkedIn skills, providing users with more powerful tools for job applications and networking.
user_story: As a user, I want to leverage Claude's advanced capabilities to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of LinkedIn automation tasks, such as applying for jobs and reaching out to contacts, so that I can maximize my professional networking opportunities.
acceptance_criteria: Claude integration is successfully added to the existing LinkedIn skills.
All existing skills (Job Auto-Apply, Profile Scraper, Contact Reacher) can utilize Claude's capabilities without errors.
New tests are written and existing tests are updated to cover Claude integration.
Documentation is updated to reflect the integration of Claude, including usage examples and any new commands.
Performance benchmarks show no significant degradation in task execution times after Claude integration.
technical_notes: Ensure that Claude's API is compatible with the existing Playwright MCP tools. Consider potential rate limits and authentication requirements when integrating Claude. Review the existing agents to determine if any need to be modified to support Claude's capabilities. Pay special attention to the Automation Agent and Web Structure Agent for potential updates.

title: add UI supporrt
business_req: Enhance user engagement by providing a graphical interface for LinkedIn automation tasks, making it accessible to non-technical users.
user_story: As a user, I want a user-friendly interface to easily access and manage LinkedIn automation tasks, so that I can efficiently utilize the automation tools without needing to interact with the command line.
acceptance_criteria: UI components are integrated with existing Playwright MCP tools.
UI allows users to select and invoke each of the three skills: Job Auto-Apply, Profile Scraper, and Contact Reacher.
UI displays real-time feedback and status updates for each skill execution.
UI adheres to LinkedIn's terms of service and does not trigger anti-detection mechanisms.
technical_notes: Ensure that the UI components are responsive and compatible with various browsers. Consider using a frontend framework like React or Vue.js for dynamic UI updates. Pay special attention to LinkedIn's DOM structure and potential changes that might affect the UI's interaction with the underlying automation scripts.

title: add K8S support
business_req: Enable scalable and efficient deployment of LinkedIn Skills services using Kubernetes on AWS infrastructure.
user_story: As an engineer, I want to deploy LinkedIn Skills services on Kubernetes to leverage its scalability and manageability features, ensuring high availability and efficient resource utilization.
acceptance_criteria: Kubernetes (K8S) manifests are created for all services in the repository.
AWS EKS cluster is configured and services are deployable to it.
CI/CD pipeline is updated to support deployment to K8S.
Documentation is updated to include K8S deployment instructions.
technical_notes: Ensure that the Kubernetes manifests include necessary configurations such as resource limits, environment variables, and secrets management. Consider using Helm charts for easier management of K8S resources. Pay attention to AWS IAM roles and permissions required for EKS. Update the CI/CD pipeline to include steps for building Docker images and pushing them to a container registry before deploying to K8S.
